name: Database Overview
description: General overview of your SQL database: table sizes, column distributions, and recent data patterns.

queries.title: Row Count per Table
queries.sql: SELECT '{{table}}' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM {{table}}

queries.title: Column Count per Table
queries.sql: SELECT '{{table}}' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS column_count FROM pragma_table_info('{{table}}')

name: Data Quality Check
description: Check data quality: null counts, duplicate detection, and value distributions for your tables.

queries.title: Null Values per Column
queries.sql: SELECT 'Analysis pending' AS status, 0 AS null_count
